name: Whitney Dankworth
title: Data Scientist II @ Microsoft
welcome:
Welcome. I'm Whitney Dankworth — Data Scientist at Microsoft with 4+ years of experience scaling AI adoption, governance, and data-driven insights.

This portfolio is an interactive terminal. Type a command below to explore.

Type 'help' to see available commands.

bio.summary: Data science can be a catch-all for many tools. My experiences in the statistical, computer science, and business worlds give me the expertise to frame and then tell valuable stories with the right tools for the job. I strive for technical excellence as well as clear communication to all stakeholders — from engineers to financiers to executives. Every day is an opportunity for learning and growth and to inspire the same in others.
education: B.S. Business and Political Economy, Computer Science — NYU Stern School of Business

highlights: Ideated and executed creation of the next-gen primary semantic data model for Windows devices across the company, enabling RAG-based AI agents across all of Windows data assets
Led transformation and modernization of Windows data governance
Forecast expected impact of executive decisions to monthly active devices and consumer lifetime value
Modeled expected post-update device health for the Windows 11 rollout using ensemble ML and pattern mining
Analysis and modeling of in-device campaign noise and impact on customer retention
Formulated methodology and delivered a POC for first-in-class ML modeling of Azure infrastructure health
COSINE (Core OS & Intelligent Edge) Data Science Team, Azure deployments
Built and maintained data pipelines to automate routine dashboarding
Manipulated 100MM+ rows of data using SQL for user taxonomy project
Classified 900+ advertisements for CTR, CPM, and revenue optimization
Used data analysis to assist advisors in rebalancing $50MM of discretionary client assets
Conducted investment research and advised financial advisors

projects.title: Windows Semantic Data Model & AI Agents
projects.description: Ideated and executed creation of the next-gen primary semantic data model for Windows devices across the company. Led transformation and modernization of Windows data governance, enabling retrieval augmented generation (RAG) based AI agents across all of Windows data assets.

projects.title: Azure Infrastructure Health Modeling
projects.description: Formulated methodology and delivered a proof-of-concept for first-in-class ML modeling of the health of Azure infrastructure. Built during internship on the COSINE (Core OS & Intelligent Edge) Data Science Team for Azure deployments.

projects.title: ICU Post-Discharge Mortality Prediction
projects.description: Academic project predicting long-term mortality for ICU patients post-discharge. Applied data science and ML techniques to healthcare data as part of NYU Stern coursework in Data Science for Healthcare.
